text: Hello, can you hear me? I'm Ethan from Nova Health Care for Mississippi. I'm reaching out regarding cashback benefit to help with auto-pocketing expenses. We have up to $10,000, especially during a hospital. Sorry, mailbox is full to send an SMF from the patients, or no, if you're under the age of 65. To send an SMF notification, press 5. [BLANK_AUDIO]
